entities.name: SORGHUM MIDGE
entities.description: Contarinia sorghicola Coq., a significant pest of grain sorghum

entities.name: GRAIN SORGHUM
entities.description: The host crop targeted by the sorghum midge

entities.name: INSECTICIDE APPLICATION
entities.description: The use of chemical insecticides at the complete-an-thesis stage for insect control

entities.name: HOST PLANT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The inherent ability of sorghum plants to resist sorghum midge infestation

entities.name: PARASITIZATION
entities.description: The biological process where parasites attack and develop within the sorghum midge larvae

entities.name: TETRASTICHUS SPP.
entities.description: A genus of wasps that act as major parasites of sorghum midge larvae

entities.name: EUPELMUS POPA
entities.description: A species of wasp that acts as a major parasite of sorghum midge larvae

entities.name: MONOCROTOPHOS
entities.description: An insecticide that was found to reduce midge parasitization by half

entities.name: MIDGE-RESISTANT GENOTYPES
entities.description: Sorghum lines that exhibit varying levels of resistance to the sorghum midge

entities.name: INTEGRATED PEST MANAGEMENT
entities.description: A strategic approach to pest control combining biological and chemical methods

entities.name: SOWING DATES
entities.description: The timing of crop planting which influences the population density of the sorghum midge
